title: lobelia sublibera
intro: Lobelia sublibera, also known as Indian tobacco or Lobelia, is a plant species in the Campanulaceae family native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia sublibera include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lobelia sublibera include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
